LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT MARINA SUN'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT -- RE: 4TH C/A SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE AMEND TO PLEAD THAT PLAINTIFFS SUFFERED SEVERE EMOTIONAL DISTRESS AND THAT DEFENDANTS ENGAGED IN OUTRAGEOUS CONDUCT IF PLAINTIFFS CAN DO SO IN GOOD FAITH. RE: 5TH C/A SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. BUT PLAINTIFFS ARE GIVEN LEAVE TO AMEND THEIR 7TH C/A FOR NEGLIGENCE TO PLEAD EMOTIONAL DISTRESS DAMAGES. RE: 9TH C/A - SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND PER NON-OPPOSITION. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: JAMES L. WARREN REPORTER: CHRISTINA PAXTON, CSR #1558.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-18-2003 Sustained
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Cynthia M. Soliman, Esq. of PRESTHOLT & FIDONE 288-6781, for defendant Marina Sun, demurring party

RULING:
No other appearance on this matter. Tentative ruling adopted -- DEFENDANT MARINA SUN'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT -- Re: 4th c/a sustained with leave amend to plead that plaintiffs suffered severe emotional distress and that defendants engaged in outrageous conduct if plaintiffs can do so in good faith. Re: 5th c/a sustained without leave to amend. But plaintiffs are given leave to amend their 7th c/a for negligence to plead emotional distress damages. Re: 9th c/a - sustained without leave to amend per non-opposition. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (JLW/301) Reporter: Christina Paxton CSR #1558

To Strike Certain Portions Of Plaintiff Complaint
Off Calendar Aug-18-2003 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Cynthia M. Soliman, Esq. of PRESTHOLT & FIDONE 288-6781, for defendant Marina Sun, moving to strike certain portions of plaintiff's complaint

RULING:
No other appearance on this matter. Tentative ruling adopted -- DEFENDANT MARINA SUN's Motion To Strike Certain Portions Of Plaintiff's Complaint -- Denied. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (JLW/301/EH) Reporter: Christina Paxton CSR #1558
